
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Rabbit|kanji=丁卯|romaji=hinoto usagi|onyomi=tei bō|p=dīngmǎo|w=ting-mao|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=deng1 maau5|j=deng1 maau5|ci=tɛŋ maːu̯²|mc=tæŋ mawX|oc-bs=tæŋ mruʔ|qq=}}
{{Otheruseslist|十干十二支の丁卯|日本海軍軍艦もしくはChōshū Domainの丁卯丸|第一丁卯|もう一隻の日本海軍軍艦|第二丁卯|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Rabbit also known as 丁卯''' (hinotou, teika nou, teika nousagi, teibou) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}.

It is the 4th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingyin|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Wuchun|ja|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Rabbit|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q16662792}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a generating relationship ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q218652}}) (i.e. Wood gives rise to Fire).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngmǎo
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 maau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-u
***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-u
***Kunyomi 3: Teika-no-usagi
***Onyomi 1: teibou
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongmyo (정묘)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mão

==Years of Yin Fire Rabbit==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 7 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|qid=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}} of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯)'s years table'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|qid=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|qid=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|qid=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|7 AD|ja|7年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/7|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=7 AD|comment=enwiki is a redirect|1=AD 7|qid=Q23344}}
* {{ill|AD 67|en|AD 67|qid=Q30227|lt=67 AD|1=AD 67}}
* {{ill|AD 127|en|AD 127|qid=Q23850|lt=127 AD|1=AD 127}}
* {{ill|187|en|187|qid=Q33201|lt=187 AD|1=187}}
* {{ill|247|en|247|qid=Q31661|lt=247 AD|1=247}}
* {{ill|307|en|307|qid=Q33724|lt=307 AD|1=307}}
* {{ill|367|en|367|qid=Q32289|lt=367 AD|1=367}}
* {{ill|427|en|427|qid=Q33327|lt=427 AD|1=427}}
* {{ill|487|en|487|qid=Q31588|lt=487 AD|1=487}}
* {{ill|547|en|547|qid=Q31004|lt=547 AD|1=547}}
* {{ill|607|en|607|qid=Q31823|lt=607 AD|1=607}}
* {{ill|667|en|667|qid=Q30702|lt=667 AD|1=667}}
* {{ill|AD 727|en|AD 727|qid=Q23557|lt=727 AD|1=AD 727}}
* {{ill|AD 787|en|AD 787|qid=Q30327|lt=787 AD|1=AD 787}}
* {{ill|847|en|847|qid=Q30354|lt=847 AD|1=847}}
* {{ill|907|en|907|qid=Q24163|lt=907 AD|1=907}}
* {{ill|967|en|967|qid=Q23699|lt=967 AD|1=967}}
|
* {{ill|1027|en|1027|qid=Q19271|lt=1027 AD|1=1027}}
* {{ill|1087|en|1087|qid=Q19461|lt=1087 AD|1=1087}}
* {{ill|1147|en|1147|qid=Q19629|lt=1147 AD|1=1147}}
* {{ill|1207|en|1207|qid=Q5232|lt=1207 AD|1=1207}}
* {{ill|1267|en|1267|qid=Q5519|lt=1267 AD|1=1267}}
* {{ill|1327|en|1327|qid=Q5792|lt=1327 AD|1=1327}}
* {{ill|1387|en|1387|qid=Q6359|lt=1387 AD|1=1387}}
* {{ill|1447|en|1447|qid=Q6433|lt=1447 AD|1=1447}}
* {{ill|1507|en|1507|qid=Q6161|lt=1507 AD|1=1507}}
* {{ill|1567|en|1567|qid=Q6642|lt=1567 AD|1=1567}}
* {{ill|1627|en|1627|qid=Q6833|lt=1627 AD|1=1627}}
* {{ill|1687|en|1687|qid=Q7668|lt=1687 AD|1=1687}}
* {{ill|1747|en|1747|qid=Q7596|lt=1747 AD|1=1747}}
* {{ill|1807|en|1807|qid=Q6909|lt=1807 AD|1=1807}}
* {{ill|1867|en|1867|qid=Q7715|lt=1867 AD|1=1867}}
* {{ill|1927|en|1927|qid=Q18110|lt=1927 AD|1=1927}}
* {{ill|1987|en|1987|qid=Q2429|lt=1987 AD|1=1987}}
|
* {{ill|2047 AD|ja|2047年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2047|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2047 AD|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2107 AD|ja|2107年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2107|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2107 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 2100年代|1=2100s|qid=Q1209304}}
* {{ill|2167 AD|ja|2167年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2167|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2167 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22世紀|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2227 AD|ja|2227年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2227|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2227 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23世紀|1=23rd century|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2287 AD|ja|2287年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2287|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2287 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23世紀|1=23rd century|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2347 AD|ja|2347年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2347|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2347 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2407 AD|ja|2407年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2407|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2407 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 25世紀|1=25th century|qid=Q49839}}
* {{ill|2467 AD|ja|2467年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2467|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2467 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2527 AD|ja|2527年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2527|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2527 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2587 AD|ja|2587年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2587|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2587 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2647 AD|ja|2647年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2647|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2647 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2707 AD|ja|2707年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2707|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2707 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2767 AD|ja|2767年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2767|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2767 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2827 AD|ja|2827年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2827|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2827 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2887 AD|ja|2887年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2887|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2887 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2947 AD|ja|2947年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2947|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2947 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

==Months of Yin Fire Rabbit==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|February|en|February|qid=Q109|lt=February|1=February}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|qid=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|qid=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|qid=Q1306596|lt=Awakening of Insects|1=Jingzhe}} until the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|qid=Q1680269|lt=Qingming|1=Qingming (solar term)}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Rabbit==

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|version=98658110|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q1061999|af|Vuurkonyn (astrologie)|cdo|Dĭng-māu|de|Feuer-Hase|fr|Lièvre de feu|hak|Tên-mâu|ja|丁卯|ko|정묘|nds|Füür-Haas|vi|Đinh Mão|za|Dingmaux|zh-min-nan|Teng-báu|zh-yue|丁卯|zh|丁卯|zh-min-nan|Teng-chháu|cdo|Dĭng-cṳ̄de|nds|Holt-Haseni|de|Yin Fire Rabbit|af|Vuurhaas (astrologie)|de|Feuer-Haseni|en|Fire Rabbit|fr|Lièvre de feushak|it|Ding-chṳ́id|za|Dingceij|ar|Yin Fire Rabbit}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
